notes: Tags: shipping-discipline, engineer-paralysis, decision-paralysis. The 'shipping-discipline' tag is shared with 2.30, 2.36, 2.47 — and the engineering layer for 2.37 specializes the discipline to the deferred-launch / constructed-dilemma case. The 'engineer-paralysis' tag is shared with 2.36 (different paralysis form: social-cost there, dilemma-construction here). The 'decision-paralysis' tag is appropriately specific. Cross-references to 2.6 (Arjuna's original dilemma) and 2.47 (foreshadow) are doctrinally accurate. The engineering layer does not contradict 2.36 (which sets up the disgrace-argument climax this verse resolves) or 2.38 (which makes the equanimity doctrine that 2.37 implicitly assumes — Ramanuja's reading — explicit).
